rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE G.R. PAUL & S.A. MOORE 2003 TRUST AS AMENDED TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer To Petition To Determine Validity Of Amendments To Trust And To Impose Constructive Trust
rulings.Rulings: The demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. The first amended petition must be filed no later than 30 days from the date of the order. The first amended petition must set forth with particularity how any alleged defect in the Notice prejudiced the petitioners. See Germino v. Hillyer (2003) 107 Cal.App.4th 951. The prevailing party shall submit a proposed order. Any party choosing to contest the court's tentative ruling shall notify opposing counsel and the court no later than 4:00 p.m. (10/29/2014).
